mapper.insert:
SELECT 'MV-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_MOVIE_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO MOVIE ( MOVIE_ID, POSTER_URL, TITLE, OPEN_DATE, OPEN_COUNTRY, RUNNING_TIME, INTRODUCE, SYNOPSIS, ORIGINAL_TITLE, STATE, LANGUAGE, BUDGET, PROFIT ) VALUES ( #{movieId}, #{posterUrl}, #{title}, TO_DATE(#{openDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), NULL, #{runningTime}, #{introduce}, #{synopsis}, NULL, #{state}, NULL, #{budget}, #{profit} )
mapper.select: SELECT M.MOVIE_ID, POSTER_URL, M.TITLE, TO_CHAR(M.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_DATE, M.OPEN_COUNTRY, M.RUNNING_TIME, M.STATE, M.INTRODUCE, M.SYNOPSIS, M.ORIGINAL_TITLE, M.LANGUAGE, M.BUDGET, M.PROFIT, F.OBFUSCATE_NAME AS OBFUSCATE_NAME FROM MOVIE M LEFT JOIN FILES F ON F.FILE_GROUP_ID = M.MOVIE_ID ORDER BY M.OPEN_DATE DESC

SELECT M.MOVIE_ID, POSTER_URL, M.TITLE, TO_CHAR(M.OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_DATE, M.RUNNING_TIME, M.STATE, M.INTRODUCE, M.SYNOPSIS, M.ORIGINAL_TITLE, M.LANGUAGE, M.BUDGET, M.PROFIT, F.OBFUSCATE_NAME AS OBFUSCATE_NAME FROM MOVIE M LEFT JOIN FILES F ON F.FILE_GROUP_ID = M.MOVIE_ID WHERE M.MOVIE_ID = #{_parameter}
